name: @buildtovalue/soundness
description: Structural soundness analysis for bpmn-react: deadlock/livelock/dead-branch detection over the process graph (O(V+E), no state-space search), delivered as plugin-compatible validation rules. Zero runtime dependencies.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs dist/cjs
